parameters.query: SELECT api_type, api_url, api_key, calendly_link, calendly_token, google_calendar_id, timezone FROM clinics WHERE clinic_id = $1;
SELECT api_type, api_url, api_key, calendly_link, calendly_token, calendly_event_type_uuid, google_calendar_id, timezone FROM clinics WHERE clinic_id = $1;

INSERT INTO appointments (clinic_id, patient_phone, service, datetime, external_id, external_calendar_id, status, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'scheduled', NOW()) RETURNING id, datetime, service;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Trigger - Execute Workflow').first().json.clinic_id }}, {{ $('Trigger - Execute Workflow').first().json.phone }}, {{ $('Trigger - Execute Workflow').first().json.service }}, {{ $('B - Validar Datos Entrada').first().json.datetime }}, {{ $('B - Crear en API Clinica').first().json.id || '' }}, {{ $('B - Crear en Calendario').first().json.uri || '' }}

parameters.query: SELECT a.*, c.api_url, c.api_key, c.calendly_token FROM appointments a JOIN clinics c ON a.clinic_id = c.clinic_id WHERE a.id = $1 AND a.patient_phone = $2;
UPDATE appointments SET status = 'cancelled', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1;
SELECT a.*, c.api_url, c.api_key, c.calendly_token, c.calendly_event_type_uuid, c.timezone FROM appointments a JOIN clinics c ON a.clinic_id = c.clinic_id WHERE a.id = $1 AND a.patient_phone = $2;

WITH old_update AS (UPDATE appointments SET status = 'rescheduled', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1) INSERT INTO appointments (clinic_id, patient_phone, service, datetime, external_id, status, created_at) VALUES ($2, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'scheduled', NOW()) RETURNING id, datetime, service;

parameters.query: SELECT a.*, c.api_url, c.api_key, c.calendly_token FROM appointments a JOIN clinics c ON a.clinic_id = c.clinic_id WHERE a.id = $1;
UPDATE appointments SET status = 'confirmed', reminder_responded = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1;

parameters.query: UPDATE appointments SET reminder_responded = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1;

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { success: true, message: 'Para que fecha y hora te viene mejor?', needs_reschedule: true } }];

parameters.query: SELECT id, service, datetime, status FROM appointments WHERE patient_phone = $1 AND datetime > NOW() AND status != 'cancelled' ORDER BY datetime ASC LIMIT 3;

parameters.jsCode:
const action = $('Trigger - Execute Workflow').first().json.action || 'desconocida';
return [{ json: { success: false, error: `Accion no reconocida: ${action}. Acciones validas: check_availability, create, cancel, reschedule, confirm_from_reminder, list_upcoming` } }];

const validationError = $('B - Validar Datos Entrada').first().json;
return [{ json: { success: false, error: validationError.error || 'Error de validacion en los datos de la cita.' } }];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO workflow_errors (workflow_name, node_name, error_message, input_data, created_at) VALUES ('WA-Appointments-Manager', $1, $2, $3, NOW());
